title: Another Emerald Sword Mod
description: An MCreator mod that adds an Emerald Sword
body:
# Another Emerald Sword Mod
**A Minecraft mod I made between 2021-2022 using MCreator**

Adds an Emerald Sword, Emerald Sword Shard, and an Emerald Ore Sword Shard

**Emerald Ore Sword Shard Recipe**
![Emerald Ore Sword Shard Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0669adb5cc3b3b52a3f49435308964eb4c0666b9_0.webp)
**Emerald Sword Shard Recipe**
![Emerald Sword Shard Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b2035e3e4e179402e9f65d929bd1acc3fc5fbcc.png)

**Emerald Sword Recipe**
![Emerald Sword Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75fefaad2a3b57b9309c3224d6b185273b9893b6.png)
